title: tubella pergrata
intro: Tubella pergrata, also known as the "False Unicorn Root," is a perennial plant that belongs to the buttercup family and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Tubella pergrata include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as menstrual cramps and digestive problems. Tubella pergrata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
